question.text: What is the approximate forward premium (in paisa) for a 1-month USDINR contract if spot is 84.00, INR rate is 6.5% p.a., and USD rate is 5% p.a.?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** 1-month premium ≈ S × (RINR - RUSD) × (1/12) = 84 × (0.065-0.05) × (1/12) = 84 × 0.015 × 0.0833 = 84 × 0.00125 = 0.105 = 10.5 paise. **The Trap:** Don't forget to divide by 12 for monthly premium. Annual premium would be 126 paise. **Cross-Exam Context:** Monthly forward premium calculation is common in Series I. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Rough rule: 1.5% annual differential on spot of 84 = about 10.5 paise per month.
